ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (government or company) */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., government, company) */,
  "government_entity_nr" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to government entities */,
  "company_entity_nr" TEXT /* Unique number assigned to company entities */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the entity */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for inquiries about the entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the entity */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the entity is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the entity is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the entity is located */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the entity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the entity was created in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated entity */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication of the report */,
  "report_link" TEXT /* Link to access the full report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., annual, quarterly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the report was created in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter (e.g., links, email) */,
  "filter_description" TEXT /* Description of what the filter does */,
  "filter_type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., text, date, numeric) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filter_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter criterion */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the criteria is associated with */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter being applied */,
  "filter_value" TEXT /* The actual value used for filtering */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator used for filtering (e.g., =, <, >, LIKE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_criteria_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_filter_criteria_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user was created in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, print) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report related to the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, in-app) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail entry */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity being modified (if applicable) */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being modified (if applicable) */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the metadata is associated with */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used to generate the report */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was retrieved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_metadata_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the version is associated with */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the report version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)
